'''ây-k-g-p''' ('''kayakgepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backchain|backchain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backchain|backchain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-k-g-p
|-
! Lemma
| kayakgepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyakgepoko|thiyakgepoko]] || [[word:jiyakgepoko|jiyakgepoko]] || [[word:shiyakgepoko|shiyakgepoko]] || [[word:kiyakgepoko|kiyakgepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyakgepoko|thuthuyakgepoko]] || [[word:jujuyakgepoko|jujuyakgepoko]] || [[word:shushuyakgepoko|shushuyakgepoko]] || [[word:kukuyakgepoko|kukuyakgepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyakgepoko|thuyakgepoko]] || [[word:juyakgepoko|juyakgepoko]] || [[word:shuyakgepoko|shuyakgepoko]] || [[word:kuyakgepoko|kuyakgepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyakgepoko|thoyakgepoko]] || [[word:joyakgepoko|joyakgepoko]] || [[word:shoyakgepoko|shoyakgepoko]] || [[word:koyakgepoko|koyakgepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
